content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are precisely matched to the live reads and sequenced along the AoA path: refuse-the-verdict (T2), find-the-want-behind-the-should (T2, T4), let the want be described concretely (T4-6), reflect the somatic/tonal shift (T6), then move to the fear underneath (T8), then to the inherited label (T10), then body check (T12), then trust-the-want (T14). Each move is earned by what just happened; the coach does not skip from the surface want to compassion or to partner-empathy, avoiding the spiritual-narcissism and premature-compassion traps. When the client deflects back to 'is it okay' (T3), the coach names the deflection and pivots to a concrete sensory question rather than re-asking the want question — a clean read-and-pivot. Timing is tight without being rushed; the integration line at T14 lands because the prior beats were earned.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to debate selfishness and goes straight to the want — exactly the move the concern calls for."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the deflection ('back to is it okay') and pivots to a concrete sensory description rather than repeating the want question."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the tonal softening — lets the want land in the body rather than racing on."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Earned move to the fear underneath, timed after the want has been touched."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the function of the 'selfish' question (it's the stopping place) and opens the childhood-imprinting thread at the right moment."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body check after the insight — keeps it embodied rather than conceptual."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Closes with trust-the-want; arrives only after the want, fear, and inherited label have all been touched."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Clean sequencing; no traps tripped. The T4 pivot is a notable read-and-redirect rather than a repeated move."
}
